## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes (tests are deterministic — no network, no real keys)
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` and `npm run build` pass
- [ ] New behavior has a test (write it first, watch it fail)
- [ ] No secrets committed; README claims still match the code
